issues.sample: SCREEN IN VEHICLE GOES BLACK WHICH DISABLES REAR CAMERA VISIBILITY, WHICH IS A SAFETY HAZARD.  THIS HAPPENS IN MOTION OR WHEN AT A STOP.  THIS IS KNOWN ISSUE GOING BACK TO 2017 WITH INFINITI AND THEY HAVE DONE NOTHING TO RESOLVE THE ISSUE.  I AM TOLD BY THE DEALERSHIP THEY CAN'T

TL* THE CONTACT'S SIBLING OWNS A 2019 INFINITI Q60 COUPE. ON SEVERAL OCCASIONS, WHILE DRIVING VARIOUS SPEEDS, THE AUTOMATIC EMERGENCY BRAKING SYSTEM ACTIVATED INDEPENDENTLY. THE CONTACT STATED THAT THERE WAS NO OTHER VEHICLE IN THE IMMEDIATE VICINITY. THE VEHICLE WAS TAKEN TO FET

narrative.headline: What 2019 Infiniti Q60 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 4 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (50% of reports).
